title: Lucid Group Q4 Earnings Preview: Will LCID Stock Continue to Rise?
text: Ahead of Q4 2023 earnings announcement, analysts questioned whether Lucid stock could sustain upward momentum. The preview highlighted earnings expectations and key metrics to watch. Q4 production beat expectations with 2,391 vehicles produced. Deliveries reached 1,734 vehicles in Q4. Despite strong production, losses continued to expand with operating challenges limiting profitability potential.
